steps.title: Substitute the given value and solve
steps.content:
We have $x + y = 53$ where $x$ is the number of marble queen pothos stems and $y$ is the number of snow queen pothos stems. Given that 13 snow queen pothos stems are propagated, we know $y = 13$. Substitute into the equation:
$$x + 13 = 53$$
Subtract 13 from both sides:
$$x = 53 - 13 = 40$$
That confirms B is correct.
